prd.user_story: As a platform engineer auditing deprecated API usage before a major Express version bump, I need to find all source files in expressjs/express that reference the deprecated req.host property.
constraints: Only include files that reference the deprecated req.host property specifically, not req.hostname.
Include definition files, test files, and changelog entries.
prd.success_definition: Agent finds all 3 source files in expressjs/express that reference the deprecated req.host property: the definition in lib/request.js, the test file test/req.host.js, and the changelog History.md.
prd.seed_prompt: Which source files in sg-benchmarks/expressjs-express reference the deprecated req.host property specifically (the definition, tests, and changelog)?
